notes: Main GE plant; expansion to 1M PE underway (2028). Treats city of Geneva + 24 communes + French communes.
Serves 12 GE communes east of Geneva. Micropollutant treatment operational since 2023 (cross-border with STEP Ocybèle/Gaillard FR).
Regional micropollutant hub for western Nyon district. To be replaced by new STEP-APEC Lavasson (Gland) ~2028.
Two-site plant (pretreatment at Rive + biological treatment at l'Asse). To be replaced by STEP-APEC Lavasson (72500 PE) ~2028.
Serves 15 communes. 35000 domestic + 10000 industrial PE. Rue de Lausanne 72. Renovation/expansion planned.
Largest plant in Lake Geneva basin. Serves Lausanne + 15 communes. New plant under construction on same site.
Near saturation. Operated by SIGE. To be decommissioned and replaced by new regional STEP at Noville (future).
Operated by SIGE. In service since 1976. To be decommissioned and replaced by new regional STEP at Noville (future).
Operated by EPUDEHL. In service since 1999. To be replaced by new regional STEP at Noville (future).
